untranslatable_reason: Signal requires identification of specific chart pattern (Broadening Formations, Right-Angled and Ascending) including pattern dimensions (tall vs wide), breakout detection, and pattern geometry. These require visual pattern recognition and structural analysis not available in the allowed indicator list. ADX, volume trends, and moving averages are proxies but cannot replace actual pattern detection. Pattern_name, breakout_direction, and pattern dimension parameters cannot be operationalized with given indicators.
translation_notes: Attempted pragmatic translation using ADX for trend confirmation, volume ratio for volume trend analysis (falling volume in bull=vol<hvol_20, rising volume in bear=vol>hvol_20), and SMA crossovers as entry/exit proxies. However, the core signal requires chartist pattern recognition which is fundamentally untranslatable to technical indicator rules. The 6-7 week weakness watch was approximated to 42-day max hold. Manual pattern detection would be required for accurate implementation.
